planned_objective: Identify a real user problem and choose a helpful invention idea.
Sketch a plan and sequence simple steps for a prototype.
Build a first prototype and test a simple feature.
Use feedback to improve the prototype.
Create a story and demo that explains the invention.
Try a simple coding or logic boost to extend the idea.
Rehearse, refine, and prepare for showcasing.
Share the final invention and reflect on learning.
